Tip of the day
Skill levels exceeding a recipe's main skill requirement in the crafting interface provide additional Quality outcome.

Boots of speed

Boots of speed
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Feet
Value: 21
Keyword: Achievement reward
Search
Keyword: 		Global
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

These shoes make your feet feel lighter and your stride quicker.

The Boots of speed item is a loot item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

Attribute

Global -1 Steps required

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Achievement Point Reward

Item Type Quantity Requirement
Check point unlocks 1 Have [55] achievement points.
